"C:\Program Files\JetBrains\CLion 2023.1.4\bin\cmake\win\x64\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\search_engine.dir/objects.a
C:\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\search_engine.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\search_engine.dir\objects1
C:\mingw64\bin\c++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\search_engine.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o search_engine.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libsearch_engine.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\search_engine.dir\linkLibs.rsp
